title: amesium ruta-muraria
intro: Ameansium ruta-muraria, also known as rue, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. Rue has been used to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, indigestion, and arthritis, as well as to treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of rue include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
